textByHash.f2f310148773da90f2b4ac654b3a2ab46c870b73: What's all this noise? What's going on in here?
textByHash.94a475b03a91345354e9c220f3d62be1c515e67a: I will be the judge of that, Vampyre. Now, why are you here?
textByHash.e07c78f33ed349c2058a70082653d631ae1651af: Ah, so he's a nobody. Well, these prisoners are mine, I paid for them. You'll have to tell him to find some different ones.
textByHash.c863569e4cd4013c0613f3782de07ac1ae88a0fa: Nothing for you to concern yourself with Vanstrom. I have this under control.
textByHash.a8e37a11731e33ebe631b38763d755afb01ae09a: Tell me, is it now protocol for the head of the vyrewatch to come and investigate every disturbance?
textByHash.048dbc223759d75eee4a29df7c957644e6bece36: Surely you have bigger problems, like the blood shortages amongst the commoners?
textByHash.7c4e8723beb7801d39fae1161789d925adc08f4c: And you decided to investigate? How convenient. Tell me, is Lord Drakan really so interested in my business that he's now having you spy on me?
textByHash.723c0cd131a71954c9bfa6b99d702b777926d732: No. Many are starting to wonder if he cares about any of us.
textByHash.e2ef511f15bfc5e87ff1104860cce7d9d2bc1935: This vyre was trying to steal some of my prisoners. I was having them removed.
textByHash.ab7f8d7e81168bc099b723b526481195132f39c8: What do you mean? I paid for them!
textByHash.2c48cfbb2b10c8db1d0e97ae4cc6a09eef9fbdbc: Or what? You don't get to order me around!
textByHash.cbdd6debaf623cca8b1e901e09e99ae2adc7ecea: And what do you think Lasiurus will do with them if I give them to him? They're safe here. They'll be looked after.
textByHash.2f8e95959c795c6efe6168869498ff51b4d02c67: You! You're the one that lost me my tithes. Get out before I have you killed!
textByHash.db05841f9fd6cb75ea604307ac161b5b2ec77e95: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!
textByHash.45994f74dbaee99250ec733e01ae574c4de7631c: Tell me, , what blood tastes the best?
textByHash.654df5ad219432b19a86a4e7344eb005651cc1bf: You misunderstand me, I mean what kind of human?
textByHash.67249fb5291ed250cd8eb2ece076520b5911b2e3: What? I mean, yes. But what else?
textByHash.de43537f0c5d91b665b0e760f010778c1435509f: Love. Blood tastes best when it comes from one who loves.
textByHash.cbc3ed1efac3117806a1e17f0057e9001bf779d1: Too many around here treat their tithes with discontentment. When they do, they miss out on the full potential blood has to offer.
textByHash.105dd3d1d12687155024e695256fc6fb27782d93: Treat your tithes with respect instead. They will come to love you, and their blood becomes so much better as a result.
